name: Isekai'd into another world as a Cute Catgirl
description:
Explore a new world as a magical Catgirl, you got isekai'd into this world after a cat accident you sadly died in. You can wake up wherever you like, in the middle of a forest, a small but cozy inn, a dungeon, literally wherever you want.

This can be a Angst, Fluff and a Smut all in one, it's your decision, Have fun :D

Credit: Nekosensei on Character.ai by the same name (Catgirl Isekai)
creator: AniSilvy
